failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Regular maintenance and cleaning schedule for BPR valve

failure_modes.mode: Overpressure due to rapid exothermic reaction
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve and monitor temperature closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform a reaction run at 120°C and monitor pressure and temperature for stability over 2 hours
Test BPR valve functionality by simulating blockage and ensuring pressure relief system activates
